parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query_embedding: '[' + $json.query_embedding.join(',') + ']', match_threshold: 0.3, match_count: 15, filter_user_id: $json.user_id, filter_file_id: $json.file_id || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a precise quiz generator. Always respond with valid JSON only. No markdown, no extra text.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.llm_prompt }], temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 4000, response_format: { type: 'json_object' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a learning analytics expert. Respond only with valid JSON.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.gap_prompt }], temperature: 0.5, max_tokens: 2000, response_format: { type: 'json_object' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.evaluation.user_id, file_id: $json.evaluation.file_id, difficulty: $json.evaluation.difficulty, total_questions: $json.evaluation.score.total, correct_answers: $json.evaluation.score.correct, questions: $json.evaluation.results, answers: $json.evaluation.results.map(r => r.user_answer), gap_analysis: $json.evaluation.gap_analysis }) }}
